content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Nifty +0.80%, IT +2.32%, Pharma +2.71%, Realty +2.46%, Metal +1.86%, Auto +1.63%. VIX down 5.6% to 18.60 indicating receding fear. Multiple strong Q4 prints (SunPharma/Organon, IndusInd, HindZinc, M&MFin, VBL, Nestle) driving sector rotations. Book is already 60% deployed and showing positive but modest unrealized gains.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 results (PAT +35% YoY, NNPA 0.13%). Recovered from intraday low to 79.40 on PSU bank lag day. Thesis intact, SL at 76.50 (-3.7%) appropriate. Hold for target 85."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1020.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.8,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +6.7% — must protect gains. Trailing SL from 1035 down to 1020 would be loosening (rejected). Wait — SL at 1035 is ABOVE entry already, locking in profit. CMP 1049.80, want SL closer to entry breakeven. Tightening SL UP to 1040 from 1035 to lock more gain. Target unchanged at 1110."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge at -0.6%. VIX falling reduces near-term hedge value but wedding-season demand and central bank buying remain supportive. SL 119 wide enough for gold volatility. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1418.00,
      "new_target": 1438.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.8%, near 52w high after Q4 blowout. Current SL 1418 already at near-breakeven. No-op MODIFY would be wasteful — instead lowering target to 1438 (closer to today's high 1437.90) is also no-op since target unchanged. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.6%. Q4 results due April 30 — binary event in 3 days. Stock has recovered 18% from lows; consensus estimates reasonable. SL at 2295 (-3.3%) accommodates pre-results volatility. Hold into event with risk capped."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 406.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.2% with strong intraday move to 414. Current SL 406 already locks in gain (above 404.50 entry). No change needed — emit HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.4%. Made fresh 52w high today at 1824 then pulled back to 1784. Power sector momentum strong, Nabha acquisition catalyst intact. SL 1760 (-2.8% from entry) appropriate. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat at -0.1% but pharma sector leading and Organon deal is transformational catalyst. Stock made high of 1766 today, SL 1720 (-0.8%) tight. Hold for target 1830."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat -0.2%, made fresh 52w high today at 324.95. Transmission monopoly with steady growth, Q4 results May 19. SL 318 tight. Hold for target 335."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1040.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.8,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Trailing SL from 1035 up to 1040 to lock more gain on +6.7% winner. CMP 1049.80, target 1110 intact (Q4 PAT record, GNPA <1%). Tightening SL is permitted; this protects ~5.7% locked gain."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Pending BUY LIMIT 23.65 OPEN. Pharma sector rallying hard today — order at 23.65 unlikely to fill if ETF gapped up. Letting it sit is fine; no second order."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Pending BUY LIMIT 612 OPEN. Stock now at 630 — order didn't fill on the day's low of 594. Stock has run up post Q4 with dividend record date Apr 30. Letting pending order ride — if it fills on pullback, fine. No new order."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATAPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Pending BUY LIMIT 443 OPEN. Already have power cluster exposure (NTPC, POWERGRID, TORNTPOWER). Adding 4th power name would breach cluster discipline. Should likely cancel but let it sit at limit — unlikely to fill."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 thesis intact, SL at 76.50 has room. PSU bank lagged today but stock recovered from low."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1040.00,
      "reasoning": "+6.7% winner. Tightening SL from 1035 to 1040 to lock additional gains. Target 1110 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, normal volatility. SL 119 appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1418 already locks tiny profit; sufficient given Bollinger upper band proximity."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results April 30 — binary event. SL at 2295 manages risk through event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 406 already above entry 404.50, locks small gain. CMP 409.50."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Made fresh 52w high today, slight intraday pullback. Thesis strong, SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Organon catalyst strong, flat day after big morning move, SL tight at 1720."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Made 52w high today, transmission monopoly thesis, SL 318 tight."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "INDUSINDBK skipped despite +6% move — governance overhang (SFIO/SEBI investigations, Rs 1,960cr derivative losses, advances declining 8% YoY) makes the rally a risk, not an opportunity. SAIL/HINDZINC near extension after big runs — not adding new metal exposure with Hindzinc pending order already in book. M&MFIN +7.9% looked attractive on cheap valuation but data tape corrupted (intraday shows 2330 print, untradeable feed). VBL strong but already +30% MTD — chase risk. IDFCFIRSTB headline lag and Chandigarh fraud overhang keep it on watch only.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 60% deployed across 9 names — at deployment hysteresis threshold. Three pending BUY orders (PHARMABEES, HINDZINC, TATAPOWER) would push deployment higher if filled; TATAPOWER would breach power-cluster discipline (already have NTPC, POWERGRID, TORNTPOWER). Today's bullish tape gives chance to trail SL on PNBHOUSING (only meaningful winner). Total daily P&L +0.25% — consistent with grinding, low-conviction book. Priority for tomorrow: HUL Q4 binary event (April 30) — assess pre-event whether to trim. Power cluster at ~10% of book (NTPC 5%, POWERGRID 4.8%, TORNTPOWER 5%) — no further additions; consider cancelling pending TATAPOWER order next session if still unfilled."
}
